name: Patrick Swayze's Chicken Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Dijon mustard (or red pepper sauce)
1 package Frozen puff pastries, thawed according to package directions (2 sheets)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken, sliced carrots and celery, onion, water, bay leaf, and pepper in a large pot. Bring to boil.
2. Reduce heat to low and skim surface. Simmer, partially covered, for 1 hour, turning the chicken after 30 minutes.
3. Remove chicken and cool it. Strain broth and remove fat. Reserve 2 cups of broth.
4. Remove skin and bones from meat and tear into large pieces. Transfer to a bowl.
5. In a saucepan, bring reserved broth to boil. Add diced carrots and celery; reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes. Add pearl onions and red pepper; simmer for 1 minute. Add mushrooms and peas; simmer for another minute.
6. Melt butter in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Add flour and cook, whisking constantly, for 1 minute. Whisk in reserved broth and milk, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and mustard. Simmer for 5 minutes, whisking occasionally.
7. Stir the cooked vegetables into the chicken mixture. Pour into 4 ovenproof individual baking dishes.
8. Cut 4 circles of pastry that are larger than the top of each dish. Make a 1-inch hole in the center of each circle and flute the edges. Brush with beaten egg.
9. Bake pot pies on a cookie sheet until tops are golden and filling is bubbly, about 25 minutes. Makes 4 servings.
